provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the Botswana Savings Bank Regulations.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Application to open an account
provisions.content:
3. Application to open an account
(1) Every application to open an account other than an account mentioned in subregulation (2) shall be made at a post office or in such other manner as the Managing Director may determine.

definitions.definition: an ordinary savings account or a save-as-you-earn account or a special savings account, as the case may be, in the Savings Bank
any association, society, club or fund approved by the Managing Director in terms of section 12 of the Act
a book issued in terms of regulation 5(1)
an account in which the minimum balance is P5 and repayment on demand and telegraphic withdrawals may be obtained at any post office
a post office or other place at which the business of the Savings Bank is conducted
an account for a fixed period contract of 24 monthly deposits, with a minimum monthly deposit of P20

an account in which the minimum balance is P200, and in which the interest is higher than that paid on an ordinary savings account.
(2) In these Regulations, "depositor" means—
( a ) in the case of a person under the age of seven years, the person making the deposit on behalf of the person under the age of seven years
